title: Karlovac、Karlovac — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Karlovac、Karlovacの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

KarlovacはKarlovacにある人口55,705の都市です。A historic city on four rivers, known for its star-shaped Renaissance fortifications, the Karlovac beer tradition, and proximity to the Plitvice Lakes National Park.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
